creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
> Affects Only Me 

Reproducible. 

% pkg info -x chromium
chromium-92.0.4515.159_1
% uname -KU
1400033 1400033
% freebsd-version -kru
14.0-CURRENT
14.0-CURRENT
14.0-CURRENT
% 

<https://www.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=chrome&sektion=1&manpath=FreeBSD+13.0-RELEASE+and+Ports>
